name: Low-Income Offer-in-Compromise Fee Waiver

eligibility.description: Individuals with adjusted gross income (AGI) that does not exceed 250 percent of the applicable poverty level.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Exempts low-income taxpayers from the 20% initial payment, the first installment payment, and the application user fee when submitting an offer-in-compromise.
